ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the batch is located */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary associated with the batch (e.g., stipends or fees) */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the batch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial document */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch associated with the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the financial document */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial document (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_documents_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., superadmin, financial officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report is generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of financial data for the batch */,
  "total_income" REAL /* Total income of the batch */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_financial_reports_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who accessed the batch or document */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES financial_documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch for which the expense is incurred */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_expenses_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch for which the income is received */,
  "income_date" TEXT /* Date when the income occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the income */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_incomes_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the financial officer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the financial officer (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)
